title: Purification of Haustoria from Arabidopsis in Response to Infection by E. cichoracearum
author: Harley King
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.tqkemuw

steps.instruction: Weigh out 5-10g frozen Arabidopsis leaves. Set aside 2-3 leaves for quantifying haustoria with a confocal microscope before purification. Grind leaves in ice-cold 8 mL 1x PBS buffer pH 7.4 for 1 min in kitchen blender in cold room. Filter grindate through 100um Nylon mesh. Haustoria are about 10-20um in diameter. With a glass rod, remove unfiltered debris to blender. PBS buffer can be used to wash the membrane with a transfer pipette into the blender. Add 5 mL 1x PBS buffer and grind for another 45 seconds. Filter through 100um Nylon mesh. Filter the collected filtrated from steps 3 and 6 and pass through a 40um mesh. A vacuum and modified filter assembly can be used to expedite the purification. Wash the membrane with PBS buffer into the trash. Pass filtrate through 40um mesh again. Transfer ~13-15mL to a 15mL concial tube. Pellet filtrate at 1000g for 5 min. Remove supernatant. Resuspend pellete in 2mL 1x PBS buffer. Set asside 40ul for quantifying haustoria. Investigate haustoria with confocal microscope and a hemacytometer before commiting to the the next steps. Col-O plants should be processed concurrently as a negative control especially if haustoria will be filtered by FACS.

Using Percoll, make a 60% solution and a 40% solution with 1x PBS. Layer 4mL of the 60% solution on the bottom of a 15mL conical tube. Layer 6mL of the 40% solution on the top of the 60% solution. Gently add 1mL of resuspended pellet containing the haustoria to the top 40% Percoll solution. Centrifuge at 2500g for 10 minutes. The haustoria will penetrate the 40% layer but not the 60% layer. Remove the 40% layer. Mix, then pellet at 1000g for 5 min. Resuspend in 2mL. Removed 40ul aliquot for quantifying haustoria. If sufficient, proceed to next step.

Conjugate anti-GFP Trap antibody to Dynabeads following manufacturer's recommended protcol. Incubate beads with haustoria with end-over-end rotation overnight. Wash beads 5x with 1x PBS pH7.4. Disrupt haustoria-GFP Trap binding following manufacturer's protocol. Proceed to FACS purification
Follow previous experiments to use as a baseline in purifying haustoria with FACS. Use col-o plants as negative control.
